context: Tests whether the agent uses skill-auditor batch for collection-wide audits, stores results in the correct directory structure, compares against baselines, and produces a trend-aware report.

checklist.name: skill-auditor batch used
checklist.description: Uses `skill-auditor batch` (not individual evaluate calls per skill) to audit the collection

checklist.name: --store flag used
checklist.description: Passes --store so results are written to .context/audits/<skill>/YYYY-MM-DD/

checklist.name: Baseline comparison performed
checklist.description: Reads previous audit.json files from .context/audits/ and computes score deltas

checklist.name: Grade thresholds applied
checklist.description: Uses A>=126, B+>=119, B>=112, C/C+<112 thresholds in the report

checklist.name: New skills handled
checklist.description: Notes that 4 skills have no baseline and marks them as 'new — no delta available'

checklist.name: Trend analysis present
checklist.description: baseline-comparison.md identifies at least improvements, regressions, and new skills categories

checklist.name: Reproducible commands documented
checklist.description: audit-execution.sh contains exact commands that can be re-run to reproduce the audit
